introductionSomali: Unit-kan wuxuu ku bilaabayaa aasaaska English-ka: 26-ka xaraf, qaabkooda weyn iyo yar, vowels iyo consonants, higgaadinta magacyada iyo dhawaaqyada bilowga ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: English-ku wuxuu leeyahay 26 xaraf. Casharkan waxaad ku baranaysaa magaca xaraf kasta iyo sida xarfaha loogu kala hormariyo A ilaa Z.
learningObjectives: U akhri xarfaha A ilaa Z si tartiib ah.
Kala saar magaca xarafka iyo dhawaaqa uu samayn karo.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Alphabet waa ururka xarfaha loo isticmaalo qorista luqad.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha u qaadan in alphabet uu yahay hal xaraf.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Letter halkan wuxuu ka dhigan yahay xaraf, mana aha warqad boosto.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Xarfaha u sheeg sida ay u kala horreeyaan.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Order wuxuu tilmaamayaa sida wax loo kala hormariyay.

practiceExercises.question: “Alphabet” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Xarfaha luqaddu ka kooban tahay”; waa macnaha Alphabet ee casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: The English alphabet has ___ letters.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Erayga “26” ayaa jumladda macne sax ah siinaya.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi Letter iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Letter waxaa loola jeedaa Xaraf.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: letter / first / A / the / is
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “A is the first letter.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: A comes before B.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Z waa xarafka ugu dambeeya.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jumladda “Z is the last letter.” ayaa si dabiici ah u gudbinaysa macnaha Soomaaliga.

practiceExercises.question: Z is the last letter of the English alphabet.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Weedhu waa sax marka la raaco waxa casharka lagu bartay.

practiceExercises.question: Si tartiib ah u sheeg A ilaa Z, kadib sheeg xarfaha magacaaga.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si cod dheer u hadal. Ujeeddadu waa dhawaaq cad iyo kalsooni, mana aha xawaare.

practiceExercises.question: Qor A ilaa Z hal mar adigoo kala fogaynaya xaraf kasta.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qoraalkaaga hubi: xaraf sax ah, kala horreyn sax ah iyo calaamadda dhammaadka.

lessons.speakingPractice: Si tartiib ah u sheeg A ilaa Z, kadib sheeg xarfaha magacaaga.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor A ilaa Z hal mar adigoo kala fogaynaya xaraf kasta.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay in English-ku leeyahay 26 xaraf oo ka bilaabma A kuna dhammaada Z. Magaca xarafka iyo dhawaaqiisa mararka qaarkood way kala duwan yihiin.

quizQuestions.question: “Alphabet” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Xarfaha luqaddu ka kooban tahay”; waa macnaha Alphabet ee casharkan.

quizQuestions.question: The English alphabet has ___ letters.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Erayga “26” ayaa jumladda macne sax ah siinaya.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Xaraf kasta wuxuu leeyahay qaab weyn iyo qaab yar. Xarafka weyn waxaa lagu bilaabaa jumlad iyo magac qof ama meel.
learningObjectives: Isku aadi capital iyo small letters.
Magacyada dadka iyo meelaha si sax ah u qor.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina uses capital letter in a short conversation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Amina waxay Xaraf weyn ku isticmaashaa wada sheekeysi gaaban.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Capital letter waxaa loo adeegsadaa bilowga jumlad iyo magacyo gaar ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina uses small letter in a short conversation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Amina waxay Xaraf yar ku isticmaashaa wada sheekeysi gaaban.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Small letters ayaa inta badan lagu qoraa erayada dhexdiisa.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Start a sentence with a capital letter.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Sentence waa erayo isu tegay oo fikrad dhammeystiran gudbiya.

practiceExercises.question: “Capital letter” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Xaraf weyn”; waa macnaha Capital letter ee casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: A sentence starts with a ___ letter.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Erayga “capital” ayaa jumladda macne sax ah siinaya.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi Small letter iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Small letter waxaa loola jeedaa Xaraf yar.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: is / Hargeisa / city / a
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “Hargeisa is a city.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: My name is Amina.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Muqdisho waa magaalo.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jumladda “Mogadishu is a city.” ayaa si dabiici ah u gudbinaysa macnaha Soomaaliga.

practiceExercises.question: A person’s name should start with a small letter.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Weedhu waa khalad; dib u eeg xeerka iyo tusaalooyinka casharka.

practiceExercises.question: Sheeg laba magac oo qof iyo laba magac oo meel ah; ku dhawaaq xarafka ay ku bilaabmaan.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si cod dheer u hadal. Ujeeddadu waa dhawaaq cad iyo kalsooni, mana aha xawaare.

practiceExercises.question: Qor magacaaga, magaaladaada iyo laba jumladood. Hubi capital letters.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qoraalkaaga hubi: xaraf sax ah, kala horreyn sax ah iyo calaamadda dhammaadka.

lessons.speakingPractice: Sheeg laba magac oo qof iyo laba magac oo meel ah; ku dhawaaq xarafka ay ku bilaabmaan.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor magacaaga, magaaladaada iyo laba jumladood. Hubi capital letters.
lessons.summarySomali: Capital letter waxaa lagu bilaabaa jumlad iyo magac gaar ah. Small letters waxaa lagu isticmaalaa inta kale ee erayada badankood.

quizQuestions.question: “Capital letter” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Xaraf weyn”; waa macnaha Capital letter ee casharkan.

quizQuestions.question: A sentence starts with a ___ letter.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Erayga “capital” ayaa jumladda macne sax ah siinaya.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi Small letter iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Small letter waxaa loola jeedaa Xaraf yar.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: A, E, I, O iyo U waa vowels. Xarfaha kale waa consonants. Vowel-ku wuxuu muhiim u yahay samaynta dhawaaqa erayga.
learningObjectives: Ka hel vowels-ka ku jira eray fudud.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Vowels-ka English-ku waa A, E, I, O iyo U.
Consonant waa xaraf aan ka mid ahayn shanta vowel.
Sound waa codka la maqlo marka xaraf ama eray la yiraahdo.

practiceExercises.question: “Vowel” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Shaqal”; waa macnaha Vowel ee casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: A, E, I, O and U are ___.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Erayga “vowels” ayaa jumladda macne sax ah siinaya.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi Consonant iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Consonant waxaa loola jeedaa Shibbane.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: vowel / is / E / a
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “E is a vowel.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: A is in apple.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: E wuxuu ku jiraa egg.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jumladda “E is in egg.” ayaa si dabiici ah u gudbinaysa macnaha Soomaaliga.

practiceExercises.question: B is a vowel.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Weedhu waa khalad; dib u eeg xeerka iyo tusaalooyinka casharka.

practiceExercises.question: Ku dhawaaq A, E, I, O, U, kadibna sheeg apple, egg, ink, orange iyo umbrella.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si cod dheer u hadal. Ujeeddadu waa dhawaaq cad iyo kalsooni, mana aha xawaare.

practiceExercises.question: Qor shanta vowel, kadib ku wareeji vowels-ka ku jira magacaaga.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qoraalkaaga hubi: xaraf sax ah, kala horreyn sax ah iyo calaamadda dhammaadka.

lessons.speakingPractice: Ku dhawaaq A, E, I, O, U, kadibna sheeg apple, egg, ink, orange iyo umbrella.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor shanta vowel, kadib ku wareeji vowels-ka ku jira magacaaga.
lessons.summarySomali: Shanta vowel waa A, E, I, O iyo U. 21-ka xaraf ee kale waa consonants. Labaduba waxay dhisaan erayada.

quizQuestions.question: “Vowel” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Shaqal”; waa macnaha Vowel ee casharkan.

quizQuestions.question: A, E, I, O and U are ___.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Erayga “vowels” ayaa jumladda macne sax ah siinaya.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Spelling waa in eray ama magac xaraf-xaraf loo sheego. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa telefoonka, xafiiska, bangiga iyo marka magaca la diiwaangelinayo.
learningObjectives: Weydii qof sida magaciisa loo higgaadiyo.
Si sax ah u qor magac la higgaadiyay.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Spell waa inaad sheegto xaraf kasta oo erayga ku jira.
Name waa magaca qof, meel ama shay lagu yaqaan.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Fadlan ku celi xarafka ugu dambeeya.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Repeat waxaa la yiraahdaa marka aad rabto in wax mar kale la sheego.

examples.english: How do you spell your name?
My last name starts with A.
examples.somali: Magacayga dambe wuxuu ka bilaabmaa A.
Kaasi ma M baa mise N?

practiceExercises.question: “Spell” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Higgaadi”; waa macnaha Spell ee casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: Please ___ your name.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Erayga “spell” ayaa jumladda macne sax ah siinaya.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi Name iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Name waxaa loola jeedaa Magac.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: spell / do / name / your / you / How
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: How do you spell your name?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “How do you spell your name?”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: How do you spell your name?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: Aamina waxaa loo higgaadiyaa A-M-I-N-A.
options: How do you spell your name?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jumladda “Amina is A-M-I-N-A.” ayaa si dabiici ah u gudbinaysa macnaha Soomaaliga.

practiceExercises.question: Spelling means saying a word letter by letter.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Weedhu waa sax marka la raaco waxa casharka lagu bartay.

practiceExercises.question: Magacaaga saddex jeer higgaadi: si tartiib ah, si caadi ah, kadib adigoo jumlad ku bilaabaya “My name is…”.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si cod dheer u hadal. Ujeeddadu waa dhawaaq cad iyo kalsooni, mana aha xawaare.

practiceExercises.question: Qor magacaaga iyo laba magac oo kale, kuna kala saar xarfaha xarriiq gaaban.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qoraalkaaga hubi: xaraf sax ah, kala horreyn sax ah iyo calaamadda dhammaadka.

lessons.speakingPractice: Magacaaga saddex jeer higgaadi: si tartiib ah, si caadi ah, kadib adigoo jumlad ku bilaabaya “My name is…”.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor magacaaga iyo laba magac oo kale, kuna kala saar xarfaha xarriiq gaaban.
lessons.summarySomali: Markaad magac higgaadinayso, xaraf kasta si cad u sheeg. Waxaad oran kartaa “How do you spell…?” ama “Please repeat.”

quizQuestions.question: “Spell” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Higgaadi”; waa macnaha Spell ee casharkan.

quizQuestions.question: Please ___ your name.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Erayga “spell” ayaa jumladda macne sax ah siinaya.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Xarafku mararka qaarkood wuxuu leeyahay dhawaaq ka duwan magaciisa. Casharkan wuxuu ku barayaa dhawaaqyo bilow ah sida b, m, s, sh iyo th.
learningObjectives: Kala garo magaca xarafka iyo dhawaaqiisa.
Ku celceli b, m, s, sh iyo th.
Si tartiib ah u akhri erayo fudud.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Erayga si tartiib ah ugu dhawaaq.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Pronounce wuxuu ka hadlayaa sida eray afka looga yiraahdo.
Listen waa inaad si feejigan codka u maqasho.

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Si tartiib ah u hadal, fadlan.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Slowly wuxuu tilmaamayaa in aan wax degdeg loo samayn.

examples.somali: B wuxuu leeyahay dhawaaqa /b/ ee book.
M wuxuu leeyahay dhawaaqa /m/ ee milk.
S wuxuu leeyahay dhawaaqa /s/ ee school.

practiceExercises.question: “Pronounce” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Ku dhawaaq”; waa macnaha Pronounce ee casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: Listen and ___ the word.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Erayga “repeat” ayaa jumladda macne sax ah siinaya.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi Listen iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Listen waxaa loola jeedaa Dhegayso.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: slowly / word / the / Pronounce
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “Pronounce the word slowly.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: B sounds like /b/ in book.
options: B wuxuu leeyahay dhawaaqa /b/ ee book.
M wuxuu leeyahay dhawaaqa /m/ ee milk.
practiceExercises.correctAnswer: B wuxuu leeyahay dhawaaqa /b/ ee book.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: M wuxuu leeyahay dhawaaqa /m/ ee milk.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jumladda “M sounds like /m/ in milk.” ayaa si dabiici ah u gudbinaysa macnaha Soomaaliga.

practiceExercises.question: The name of a letter is always the same as its sound in a word.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Weedhu waa khalad; dib u eeg xeerka iyo tusaalooyinka casharka.

practiceExercises.question: Dhegayso maskax ahaan kadib ku celi: book, milk, school, shop, thank. Afkaaga si cad u dhaqaaji.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si cod dheer u hadal. Ujeeddadu waa dhawaaq cad iyo kalsooni, mana aha xawaare.

practiceExercises.question: Qor b, m, s, sh iyo th; mid kasta agtiisa ku qor hal eray oo dhawaaqaas leh.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qoraalkaaga hubi: xaraf sax ah, kala horreyn sax ah iyo calaamadda dhammaadka.

lessons.speakingPractice: Dhegayso maskax ahaan kadib ku celi: book, milk, school, shop, thank. Afkaaga si cad u dhaqaaji.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor b, m, s, sh iyo th; mid kasta agtiisa ku qor hal eray oo dhawaaqaas leh.
lessons.summarySomali: Magaca xarafku iyo dhawaaqiisu way kala duwanaan karaan. Dhegaysi iyo ku celcelin tartiib ah ayaa kaa caawinaya pronunciation-ka.

quizQuestions.question: “Pronounce” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Ku dhawaaq”; waa macnaha Pronounce ee casharkan.

quizQuestions.question: Listen and ___ the word.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Erayga “repeat” ayaa jumladda macne sax ah siinaya.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Casharkan wuxuu isku soo koobayaa alphabet-ka, capital iyo small letters, vowels, consonants, spelling iyo dhawaaqyada aasaasiga ah.
learningObjectives: Higgaadi magacyo oo ku dhawaaq erayo fudud.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Review waa ku noqoshada wixii la bartay si loo xoojiyo.
Practice waa samaynta hawl marar badan si xirfaddu u fiicnaato.
Correct wuxuu tilmaamayaa jawaab aan khalad ahayn.

practiceExercises.question: “Review” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Dib-u-eegis”; waa macnaha Review ee casharkan.

practiceExercises.question: There are ___ vowels in English.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Erayga “five” ayaa jumladda macne sax ah siinaya.

practiceExercises.question: Isku aadi Practice iyo macnihiisa.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Practice waxaa loola jeedaa Ku celcelin.

practiceExercises.question: Kala hagaaji: name / Spell / your
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Kala horreynta saxda ahi waa “Spell your name.”.

practiceExercises.question: Turjun: A is a capital letter.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Turjumaadda saxda ahi waxay gudbinaysaa macnaha jumladda oo dhan.

practiceExercises.question: U beddel English: a waa xaraf yar.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jumladda “a is a small letter.” ayaa si dabiici ah u gudbinaysa macnaha Soomaaliga.

practiceExercises.question: English has 26 letters.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Weedhu waa sax marka la raaco waxa casharka lagu bartay.

practiceExercises.question: Sheeg alphabet-ka, vowels-ka, kadib higgaadi magacaaga iyo magaca magaaladaada.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Si cod dheer u hadal. Ujeeddadu waa dhawaaq cad iyo kalsooni, mana aha xawaare.

practiceExercises.question: Qor 26-ka xaraf laba saf: capital letters iyo small letters. Hoosta ka qor shanta vowel.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Qoraalkaaga hubi: xaraf sax ah, kala horreyn sax ah iyo calaamadda dhammaadka.

lessons.speakingPractice: Sheeg alphabet-ka, vowels-ka, kadib higgaadi magacaaga iyo magaca magaaladaada.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 26-ka xaraf laba saf: capital letters iyo small letters. Hoosta ka qor shanta vowel.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad dib u eegtay dhammaan Unit 1. Hadda waa inaad aqoonsan kartaa xarfaha, higgaadin kartaa magac, kala saari kartaa vowels iyo consonants, kuna celcelin kartaa dhawaaqyada.

quizQuestions.question: “Review” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Dib-u-eegis”; waa macnaha Review ee casharkan.

quizQuestions.question: There are ___ vowels in English.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Erayga “five” ayaa jumladda macne sax ah siinaya.

quizQuestions.question: Isku aadi Practice iyo macnihiisa.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Practice waxaa loola jeedaa Ku celcelin.

unitQuiz.question: Immisa xaraf ayuu leeyahay English alphabet-ku?
Waa kee xarafka ugu horreeya?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: A waa xarafka ugu horreeya ee alphabet-ka.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa ah capital letter?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: M waa qaabka weyn; m waa qaabka yar.

unitQuiz.question: A sentence starts with a ___ letter.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Jumlad waxaa lagu bilaabaa capital letter.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa vowel ah?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: E wuxuu ka mid yahay A, E, I, O, U.

unitQuiz.question: Kee ayaa consonant ah?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: T ma aha vowel, sidaas darteed waa consonant.

unitQuiz.question: A, E, I, O and U are ___.
Sidee loo higgaadiyaa “Ali”?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Ali xarafihiisu waa A, L iyo I.

unitQuiz.question: Kala hagaaji: spell / name / your / Please
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Qaabka dabiiciga ahi waa “Please spell your name.”

unitQuiz.question: “Repeat” maxay ka dhigan tahay?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Repeat waxaa loola jeedaa in wax mar kale la sameeyo ama la yiraahdo.

unitQuiz.question: A letter name and its sound are always identical.
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Magaca xarafka iyo dhawaaqiisa erayga mararka qaar way kala duwan yihiin.

unitQuiz.question: Eraygee ku bilaabma dhawaaqa /sh/?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Shop wuxuu ku bilaabmaa isku-dhafka sh.

unitQuiz.question: Maxaa fiican marka pronunciation la baranayo?
unitQuiz.explanationSomali: Dhegaysi iyo ku celcelin ayaa dhisa dhawaaq cad.
